{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Senate
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Senate]] has discussed declaring [[The Last Horizon]] an enemy of [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
